title: Wikipedia: Champ de Mars
snippet: The Champ de Mars is a large public greenspace in Paris, France, located in the seventh arrondissement, between the Eiffel Tower to the northwest and the École Militaire to the southeast.

title: Wikipedia: Eiffel Tower
snippet: The Eiffel Tower is a lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.

title: Wikipedia: List of tallest buildings and structures in the Paris region
snippet: The tallest structure in the city of Paris and the Île-de-France is the Eiffel Tower in the 7th arrondissement, 330 meters high, completed in 1889 as the gateway to the 1889 Paris Universal Exposition.
